title: Pass 5.A.1: ferrotorch-vision SSD300 Module::forward zero-stub silently registered
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-vision audit, STUB bucket.

SSD300 `Module::forward` returns zeros (silent stub). The model is wired into the pretrained registry (`registry.rs`), so `load_pretrained::<f32>("ssd300")` succeeds and downstream inference receives all-zero logits — silent wrong output.

Acceptance:
- Either implement SSD300 forward properly, OR
- Remove the entry from registry.rs + return a documented `NotImplementedError` with crosslink follow-up.

Either path: discriminating fixture test that catches the zero-tensor regression.
